title: Local Files And Paths Used By The Kubelet — Kubelet configuration files
text:
The path to the kubelet configuration file can be configured
using the command line argument
--config
. The kubelet also supports
drop-in configuration files
to enhance configuration.

Certificates and private keys are typically located at
/var/lib/kubelet/pki
,
but can be configured using the
--cert-dir
kubelet command line argument.
Names of certificate files are also configurable.
